_meta.description: UI element → data field mapping for /attack-paths page. Each row is one UI element. Updated: 2026-05-19. Source: routes.py SELECT audit + writer.py schema + NodeBox.jsx field audit.
statuses: bug=field mismatch between what UI reads vs what data returns
bff_gap=field in DB but not selected by engine SQL

example_value: Internet Exposure to Crown Jewel via IAM Escalation
gap_description: attack_name is written by path_enricher.py (threat stage 9), not core writer. NULL if enricher did not run or threat-v1 engine was unavailable. UI falls back to chain_type string.
Engine computes open_days in SQL (not stored column). BFF has safety fallback to 0 at line 187 — this masks engine errors. Value is correct when engine is healthy.

ui_component: AttackPathRow — not displayed, but used in groupBy
AttackPathRow — currently used in groupBy only
gap_description: Written by path_enricher (threat stage). NULL if enricher did not run. JSONB shape varies — some entries are plain strings [T1234] not objects.
fix_effort: engine — standardise item shape in path_enricher

ui_component: NOT RENDERED TODAY — planned for redesign
gap_description: Was bff_gap: confidence_level not in paths_sql SELECT. Fixed 2026-05-19: added to SELECT in routes.py. Note: field is NULL when path_enricher did not run.

choke_node_uid tells which node is the choke but gives no count of how many paths share it. ChokeBar chip shows choke count via separate /choke-points endpoint (group-by query). The per-path row has no 'choke_path_count' field.
fix_effort: bff — join choke_points count onto each path row

ui_component: NOT RENDERED TODAY — planned for redesign filter
gap_description: Was bff_gap: account_id and provider not in paths_sql SELECT. Fixed 2026-05-19: added both fields to SELECT in routes.py.
node_name can be NULL if hop_evidence did not carry ev.get('node_name'). Falls back to node_uid slice.
Was bug: NodeBox read node.misconfig_count (always undefined from steps). Fixed 2026-05-19: NodeBox now derives misconfigCount from misconfigs?.length with misconfig_count as fallback.

ui_label: EPSS score in node hover tooltip
gap_description: Was bug: tooltip read cve.epss but step cves store epss_score. Fixed 2026-05-19: NodeTooltip now resolves worstCveEpss = epss ?? epss_score and worstCveId = cve_id ?? title. Sort comparator also fixed.

ui_label: Purple star badge on last node
SG rule detail in edge hover tooltip
Node accent bar color by severity
db_column: derived client-side from attack_path_nodes.misconfigs + cves JSONB
gap_description: Was gap: NodeBox accent bar always used resource-type color. Fixed 2026-05-19: NodeBox now derives worst severity from misconfigs[]+cves[] and applies SEV_COLOR_MAP to the top accent bar. Falls back to cfg.color when no findings.

db_column: derived by _parse_region(node_uid) — ARN parts[3] or synthetic uid parts[0]
gap_description: Was gap: no region in attack_path_nodes. Fixed 2026-05-19: engine detail endpoint injects step.region via _parse_region() helper. Handles AWS ARN format and synthetic region:name format. Returns None for GCP/Azure/OCI UIDs that don't encode region.

ui_label: Choke point hex badge on node
ui_component: NOT RENDERED TODAY — ready for canvas build
gap_description: Was gap: no is_choke_point on steps. Fixed 2026-05-19: engine detail endpoint (routes.py) now injects is_choke_point=True on the step whose node_uid matches path.choke_node_uid. BFF passes through.

ui_label: Resource name + type icon in panel header
Misconfig finding list with title + severity

example_value.title: Security Group allows SSH from internet

db_column: attack_path_nodes.cves JSONB — items: {rule_id, title, severity, epss_score, cvss_score}
gap_description: Note: cves[] items use epss_score (not epss). UI must read .epss_score — see z2_epss_on_hover bug.

ui_label: CDR threat detection list with MITRE tag
db_column: attack_path_nodes.threat_detections JSONB — items: {rule_id, title, severity, mitre_technique_id, mitre_tactic}

ui_label: Why this hop — traversal reason text
example_value: IMDSv1 enabled allows credential theft; IAM role has s3:* on *

ui_label: Choke point badge in panel header
gap_description: Fixed as part of z2_is_choke_point 2026-05-19. Engine injects flag, BFF passes through.

ui_component: NodeBox.jsx badge (shown when no other badges) / PathDetailPanel header (planned)
reads_field: nodeRiskScore = RISK_SCORE_MAP[derivedSeverity]: critical=90, high=70, medium=50, low=30
db_column: derived client-side from misconfigs[]+cves[] worst severity
gap_description: Was gap: no per-node score. Fixed 2026-05-19: NodeBox derives nodeRiskScore as proxy from worst finding severity. Score shown in NodeBox badge when no misconfig/CVE/CDR badges present. Full real posture score (resource_security_posture.overall_posture_score) can be added in a future session via BFF join.

ui_label: Account and region in panel sub-header
db_column: account_id+provider inherited from attack_paths path header; region derived from node_uid
gap_description: Was gap: no account/region on steps. Fixed 2026-05-19: engine detail endpoint injects account_id+provider from path header and region via _parse_region(). All three fields now in every step object.
Security: NEVER render policy_statement for viewer role. Strip at BFF level per RBAC rules.

fixed_2026_05_19: z2_epss_on_hover (B2): NodeBox tooltip epss ?? epss_score; cve_id ?? title
z1_confidence_level (G1): added to engine paths_sql SELECT
z1_account_provider (G2): account_id + provider in engine paths_sql SELECT
z2_is_choke_point + z3_choke_flag_in_panel (G3): engine injects is_choke_point per step
z2_node_region + z3_node_account_region: engine injects account_id+provider from path header + region via _parse_region()
z2_node_severity_color: NodeBox accent bar uses derivedSeverity from worst misconfig/CVE finding
remaining_partials: z1_attack_name: NULL when path_enricher (threat stage 9) did not run
z1_technique_chain: JSONB shape varies (string vs object); enricher-dependent
z1_choke_indicator: no count of how many paths share the choke node
deploy_needed: engine-attack-path: routes.py changed (G1+G2+G3+region+account) — needs docker build + push + rollout
